title: RIP Claude Fable, open-source AI unleashed, full body avatars, new Google models, new TTS: AI NEWS
summary: AI Search covers a weekly digest of AI news including model releases (GLM 5.2, Kimi K2.7, MiniMax M3), research projects in vision and avatars (Flex4DHuman, MeshFlow, Millivid), new Google models and features (Gemini Live Translate, DiffusionGemma), and text-to-speech tools. The video notes Claude Fable's discontinuation and highlights open-source AI developments across multiple domains.
writeup: This AI Search weekly digest rounds up recent model releases including GLM 5.2, Kimi K2.7, and MiniMax M3, alongside vision and avatar research such as Flex4DHuman, MeshFlow, and Millivid. It covers new Google entries including Gemini Live Translate and DiffusionGemma, plus text-to-speech tools, and notes the discontinuation of Claude Fable. The throughline is a wave of open-source activity spanning diffusion models, video generation, 3D avatars, and live translation.
